issues.problem: The hero image on the right still bleeds on three edges (top, right, and bottom), violating the style guide rule: 'Images bleed to page edge on at most one side.'
issues.fix: Add a margin to the top and bottom of the hero image so that it only bleeds on the right edge.

notes: The CTA text color has been successfully updated to Copper (#C1673C). Once the right-hand image bleeding issue is resolved, this piece is ready for approval.
